comment: Tiny but perfect. Woke up to bells and rooftops every morning, totally worth the climb up Alfama.
Ana was so kind and the balcony tiles are gorgeous. Spotless.
Loved this place. Bright, quiet, walkable to everything. Kaitlyn and I already want to come back.
Great spot, beautiful light. A little street noise on weekend nights.
The Douro view did all the work. Rui left us pastel de nata and good wine tips. No notes.
Stunning river views and impeccably clean. Rui is a wonderful host.
Cute studio in a fun neighborhood. Stairs are steep but the cafes nearby make up for it.
Perfect base for our reunion weekend. Walkable to everything, porch was made for late-night catch-ups.
Charming carriage house, Margaret thought of every detail. Steps from the squares.
Beautiful townhouse, plenty of room for our group. Loved the Jones Street location.
Quiet and close to family, exactly what I needed for a quick overnight. Carol made check-in easy.
Comfortable little bungalow, great for a short stay near Five Points.
